title: Crispy Vanilla Indian Chickpea Bowl
description: A velvety, energizing bowl featuring spiced chickpeas coated in vanilla sugar, air‑fried to crispy perfection and served over fresh greens.
instructions: Drain and rinse the chickpeas, then pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a bowl, toss the chickpeas with olive oil, cumin, coriander, garam masala, turmeric, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Stir in the vanilla sugar until the chickpeas are lightly glazed.
Spread the chickpeas in the air fryer basket in a single layer and air‑fry for 12 minutes, shaking halfway through, until crispy.
While the chickpeas are cooking, prepare the toppings: chop cilantro, squeeze lemon juice, and dice cucumber if using.
Once cooked, transfer the chickpeas to a bowl and pour the lemon juice over them.
Toss the chickpeas gently with the cilantro and cucumber, if desired.
Serve immediately, spooning the crispy vanilla chickpeas into a bowl of fresh greens for a complete meal.
